titleStmt.title: SII 17.317: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 317. (A.R. No. 288 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
This records a gift of 96 sheep left in the hands of shepherds (maṉrāḍis) Kāḷan Ēṟaṉ and Taṇiyall-Irāmaṉ, by Āṇitira Śaṅkaraṉ, for burning a perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti[śrī .*] tirumaṉṉivaḷaraThis text contains many scribal mistakes.Irunilamaṭanntaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttaniccelviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarākki yiṉpu
ṟa neṭutuyiluḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟaināṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelippaṭarvaṉavāciyuñcuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷip pākkaiyum
naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭar Īḻattaraicar tamuṭiyu māṅkavaṟ teviyar O
ṅkeḻil muṭiyum munṉavar pakkal tenṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intira ṉāra(va) mun teṇṭiraiyīḻamaṇṭala
muḻuvatu meṟipaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatir velaittol peru
ṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruvil cinavil Irupattorukāl laraicukaḷaikaṭṭa paracirāman melvaruñcān=timaṟ ṟivaraṇ karuti Iru
ttiya cempon tirutta(k)ku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil ḻutukiṭṭoḷitta caraciṅka naḷapperum pūka
ḻoṭumpiṭiyiliraṭṭapā Eḻaraiilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkirakoṭṭamum mūtiravaṭaval
lai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāṭānāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcila vira pañcappaḷḷiyum pā(r)caṭaippaḻana mācuṇa tecamum
Ayarvilvaṇkirtti Ātinakaravaiyil can=tiranṟolkulat tin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikula
tanakkukaiyum kiṭṭaruñceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviḻaiyamum pūcurar cernalk kocalaiṉāṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai
colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākki tikkiṇa kirtti takkanal lāṭamum kovintacantaṉ māviḻinto
ṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅku Oṭṭamayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir
paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunaṟkeṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvil palakalañ celutti caṅki
rāma vicaiyottuṅkapanmanākiya kiṭārattaracaṉai vākaiyamporukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya pe
run(o)tip piṟakkamum Ārttavanakaṉakar porttoḻil vācal viccātira toraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉamaṇi putavamum
kanamaṇik katavamum niṟaicirvicaiyamum tuṟainirppunṉaiyum vanmalaiyūril ṉoṉmalaiyūrum
Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkā yokamum kāppuṟu niṟai punal
māppoppāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkorp pukaḻ talaitta
kkolamum titaṟuvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmurak kaṭun=tiṟal nilaāmuritecamum tenakkalarppo
ḻil māṉakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāval kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanma
rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu [10 8] Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
perumpāṇappāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti mātevaṟku puliyūrkkoṭṭattu tankūṟṟu ccālai
nāṭṭu talai ruṭaiyān Āṇitirac caṅkar(ā)ṉ vaiytta tirunun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟukku Itteva
r maṭaviḷākamāna civapātacekaramaṅkalattu Irukkum maṉṟāṭi kāḷaṉ Eṟan vacam vaiytta cāvāmuvā
perāṭu nāṟpatteṭṭum meṟpaṭiyūr manṟāṭi taṇiyillirāman vacam vaiytta cāvāmuvā
perāṭu nāṟpatteṭṭu Āka Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟu Āṟum koṇṭu nicata ney Uḻakkāka tirunū n=tāviḷa
ḷakku Oṉṟum can=tirātittavaṟ muṭṭāmey celuttuvomānom maṉṟāṭiy kāḷan Eṟanum taṇiyil
lirāmaṉum Ivviruvarom Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣaiy .There are two more lines after this referring to another gift of sheep for a lamp.
Digital edition of SII 17.317 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
